_comment: RemedyMatch funnel checkout catalog. Source of truth for PRICE (QBO Items carry no UnitPrice). Each product maps a funnel slug -> the existing QuickBooks Item id (realm 193514563989859) + price in cents. Prices populated 2026-05-30 from the specific-formulations Pinecone (exact-title matches). pinecone_title = the EXACT specific-formulations namespace title for the content layer (deterministic title-filter fetch; curated 2026-05-30 because fuzzy embedding mis-maps infoceuticals e.g. ESR). Add products / variants (larger bottles, cellophane refill packs) with their own qbo_item_id + price_cents. info_only items (Kloud, Centropix) use price_cents 0 + affiliate_url. | EXPANDED to all products from specific-formulations Pinecone (name/price/url/product_id); new entries have no qbo_item_id (created on first sale).
_wholesale_schema: Phase 1 wholesale pricing engine (dashboard/wholesale_pricing.py): a product MAY add optional fields — bottle_type (string; matches dashboard.shipping bottle_types.name, used to source the box-fit large-box capacity B), cogs_cents (int; landed product cost), fulfillment_cents (int; per-bottle pick/pack/ship). Retail = price_cents. cogs+fulfillment gate the wholesale margin floor; when unset the margin is left unverified (loud warning). Populate per product before wholesale go-live (data task, see spec 2026-06-01 section 5).

therapeutic-nightlight.name: Therapeutic Nightlight
therapeutic-nightlight.intro: A 660 nm soft-laser red nightlight that lets you navigate safely in the dark while supporting melatonin, night vision, and the mitochondria in your eyes.
therapeutic-nightlight.description: The Therapeutic Nightlight is a soft-laser red nightlight designed by Dr. Glen Swartwout. It uses a 660 nm wavelength soft-laser red light and turns itself on automatically in low light, so you can move through your home at night without switching on white light that suppresses night vision and the pineal gland's secretion of melatonin. Red light is the one part of the spectrum that preserves pineal function at night, and at 660 nm it also reaches the tissues of the eye even when your eyes are closed, supporting mitochondrial energy production while you sleep. Because melatonin is the main endocrine regulator of the day and night cycle, protecting it supports restful sleep, healthy night vision, and macular health. Just plug it into your bedroom, bathroom, or hallway. Built-in light-sensor control gives 100% automatic operation. Backed by a 3-year warranty and a 60-day money-back guarantee.

biocompatible-nightlight.name: Biocompatible Nightlight
biocompatible-nightlight.intro: A red-filtered nightlight for hallways, bathrooms, and bedrooms that lets you see in the dark without the white light that disrupts sleep.
biocompatible-nightlight.description: The Biocompatible Nightlight filters white LED light through a red filter, so you can light hallways, bathrooms, and other spaces for nighttime navigation without turning on white light sources that disrupt sleep for the rest of the night. Only red light preserves the pineal gland's production of melatonin at night, the hormone that governs the day and night cycle and supports restful sleep. It is the biocompatible way to see in the dark while protecting your melatonin and your night vision. Just plug it in wherever you need safe nighttime navigation.

golden-ragwort-flower-essence-in-terrain.name: Golden Ragwort Flower Essence in Terrain Restore
golden-ragwort-flower-essence-in-terrain.pinecone_title: Golden Ragwort Flower Essence in Terrain Restore
golden-ragwort-flower-essence-in-terrain.description:
To break the power of obsessive thoughts that keep on endlessly looping round and round. Ragwort helps us to tackle problems at their roots. It interrupts the endless looping thoughts that otherwise tend to feed on themselves.

Obsession is caused by a feedback system that has become unstable. Our thoughts try to find answers to our difficulties, but the effort always leads back to the beginning, where we start the same process all over again. It is as if we are playing a game of snakes and ladders where all the last six squares have a snake that takes us back to the beginning!

Ragwort has two properties that can help us. First it works to remove the emotional kick that we get from obsessive thoughts. Often it is the emotion that keeps the thoughts running.

Second, it is a strong tough plant. That quality of strength can support us in the change period whilst we readjust to having a much quieter mind.

It may seem surprising, but a quiet mind can feel quite alien and distressing when we have become accustomed to the constant mind chatter of obsessive thoughts. We need to learn how to manage without a constant emotional stimulus and Ragwort can be very useful in enabling that chan

oleander-flower-essence-in-terrain-resto.description:
We all walk a path through life, although some of us are more aware of the way than others. This path is our own path of light and truth. Along it there are many sign posts that we recognise, showing we are indeed doing the right thing, living our life as we should. We feel safe and empowered on this path, comfortable with the direction we are traveling.

However, at times, the events of life force us off the path and we no longer sense the light in our mind. Our heart begins to close down and our aura diminishes in brightness. Emotionally we can experience, doubt, anxiety, depression or other negative feelings. The truth, light and love depart our lives like the sun going
behind a cloud.

Perhaps we have experienced some bad news or encountered a series of events that have broken our spirit and resolve. We may have become cynical or downhearted by what life has thrown at us. For some of us this loss of our light and direction is temporary, lasting only a few days or weeks, whilst for others it has seemingly become a permanent state of being that is painful to live with.

Suggested uses for Oleander:
at crucial times in our lives when we may falter on the path, unable to or doubtfu

sunflower-flower-essence-in-terrain-rest.pinecone_title: Sunflower Flower Essence in Terrain Restore
sunflower-flower-essence-in-terrain-rest.description:
Healing Qualities: strengthens one's radiant expression of self; encourages a balanced expression of masculine energy in men and women; promotes a functional relationship with authority.

How can we find the balance between the self-promoting egotist on the one side, and the self-effacing “shrinking violet” on the other? Both lack a solid connection to a core sense of Self: the one compensates with an extravagant display of bravado, the other by withdrawal and timidity. The flower essence of Sunflower addresses both sides of this polarity, helping us develop a confident radiant sense of our individual Self, while remaining connected to a larger transpersonal Self.

Sunflower essence was used for a nurse who had difficulty asserting herself with strong personalities in her life. Like many people who need Sunflower, she had a troubled relationship in childhood with a strong, domineering father. Her pattern of trying to placate him by negating her own power was repeated in adult life, particularly in her marriage. The Sunflower essence help her find her own power and speak clearly for her needs, which in turn allowed her to be even more radiant and compassionate in her healing service

Some thoughts and patterns of behavior can disappear and be transformed. Through this process of inner cleansing we can leave behind the many things that are old and outdated and create a feeling of lightness and a new meaning of life.

We learn to deploy all our inner potential and to trust in our intuition.

On the spiritual level: It is the bird of wisdom. Its healing mission is to lead us into the darkness of our soul so that we consciously observe our shadow and accept it. It shows us a capacity that is numbed within us and that we must learn how to use it. On the body level: The salamander helps balance the fire of the people and regenerate it. The fire is force of action, fulfillment, heat, creative power, enthusiasm and sexuality. If we have used too much of this energy, we have an energy imbalance. The salamander helps us regenerate this force and balance its energy. In acupuncture, the essence acts very well on the meridian points corresponding to fire element. It possesses a strong regeneration force. On the emotional level: The Salamander helps us use our force to heal old wounds. Certain feelings that have been injured in the past can be healed on the energy level. We become aware of our rich inheritance and thus our self-esteem increases.

The remedy helps bring us back to earth and back to ourselves so that we can act to build a better life, instead of living in daydreams. As Clematis people our thoughts drift away to imagined futures.

Clematis is one of the ingredients in Dr. Bach’s original crisis formula, where it is used to help the fuzzy, faint, light-headed feelings that may come in emergencies.

Dr. Bach’s description:
Those who are dreamy, drowsy, not fully awake, no great interest in life. Quiet people, not really happy in their present circumstances, living more in the future than in the present; living in hopes of happier times, when their ideals may come true. In illness, some make little or no effort to get well, and in certain cases may even look forward to death, in the hope of better times; or maybe, meeting again some beloved one whom they have lost. Clematis is for people whose minds drift away from the present into fantasies of the future, or into alternative versions of the present. Often they dream of future success, creative endeavour, and achievement. The danger is that they are not sufficiently anchored in reality to make their dreams happen.

white-bleeding-heart-flower-essence-in-t.description:
This is an essence that works in the heart chakra. It is the essence to use when you find yourself in a situation where emotional ‘letting go’ is required. It is particularly helpful where there is a degree of unhealthy emotional attachment to a person or situation that is preventing everyone concerned from moving forward.

In the last few years this kind of ‘letting go’ has been a very predominant theme in many people’s lives as old karmic relationships have been released to make way for something new. No matter how much we might understand the need for these changes at a rational level they can still be hard emotionally.

Bleeding Heart essence can be a very effective essence to take when we need help to be able to flow through such situations with more ease and grace.

Opening the heart chakra to receive a greater flow of love and unity consciousness is something we are all currently working with. However, very often the first thing we meet as we open the doors to our heart chakra is the emotional pain that caused us to close them in the first place. This can be an uncomfortable, somewhat disconcerting experience if we do not understand what is happening.
